title: Secrets, Dependencies, Static Analysis, and Supply Chain · Repository Factory
summary: Build layered security gates for source, dependencies, workflows, and releases. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a secure-development gate stack while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Prevent, detect, revoke, and remediate committed credentials and sensitive files.
Scan direct and transitive dependencies and triage exploitability and reachability.
Use static security analysis for data flow and dangerous patterns with reviewed queries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.

steps.title: Extend the cumulative artifact

content.code:
gates-artifact-provenance-o98vfd:

  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
